column1: feedback_text
feedback_text

"Tried to reschedule my scan three times over the past two weeks. Still haven't received confirmation. Called support twice and left messages but no one has called me back. Really frustrated with this process."
"Everything was smooth from start to finish. The facility was clean
"Booking system showed my preferred time slot as available but when I clicked to confirm I got an error message. Tried multiple times
"The scan itself was quick and the technician made me feel comfortable. Results came back faster than expected and the Scan Advisor walked me through everything. Worth every penny."
"Requested to change my appointment two weeks ago due to a work conflict. Got an automated email saying someone would get back to me within 48 hours. Still waiting. Had to miss my original scan."
"Overall good experience. Only complaint is the facility was a bit hard to find - better directions would help. But the scan quality and follow-up were excellent."
"Absolute disaster. Showed up for my appointment and they had no record of it. Showed them my confirmation email and they said the system must have had an error. Wasted my entire morning."
"Pretty good experience overall. Scan was thorough and staff answered all my questions. Would have been nice to get results a bit faster but understand it takes time to review."
"Communication is terrible. I asked a simple question about my results three days ago and still haven't heard back. Had to follow up twice. For the price we pay this is unacceptable."
"Impressed with how comprehensive the scan is and how knowledgeable the radiologist was during my results review. Feel much more confident about my health now."
"The scan itself was fine but getting scheduled was a nightmare. Website kept crashing when I tried to book. Eventually called but was on hold for 30+ minutes."
"Best preventive health decision I've made. The whole team was incredibly professional and the technology is amazing. Already referred two friends."
"Very disappointed. Results took three weeks to get back to me despite being told 7-10 days. When I called to check status I got transferred three times and no one could tell me anything."
"Great experience at the facility. Staff was warm and welcoming. Only minor issue was some confusion about parking but they sorted it out quickly."
"Tried to reschedule due to being sick and the process was incredibly difficult. Couldn't do it online
"Everything exceeded my expectations. From booking to results delivery
"Website said appointments available at my preferred location but when I went to book it said no availability for 6 weeks. False advertising. Very frustrating."
"Decent experience overall. Scan was thorough but the facility was quite cold and uncomfortable. Staff was nice though and tried to make me comfortable."

"Tried to reach someone to discuss my abnormal finding for two days. Left multiple voicemails marked urgent. Finally got a callback 48 hours later. This is my health we're talking about - unacceptable response time."
"Cannot say enough good things. The Scan Advisor was incredibly thorough in explaining my results and next steps. Feel so much better having this baseline."
"Booking process needs serious work. Had to create an account
"Good experience at the imaging center. Staff was professional. My only complaint is the follow-up communication could be better - had to chase for answers."
"Scheduled my scan for 9am. Arrived on time. Waited 45 minutes past my appointment time with no explanation or apology. Time is valuable too."
"The whole process was seamless. Love that I can message my Scan Advisor anytime and get quick responses. This is the future of healthcare."
"Customer service is severely lacking. Sent three emails asking about insurance and never got a response. Finally called and got disconnected twice before getting through."
"Really thorough scan and excellent follow-up care. Appreciated how much time the doctor spent reviewing my results with me. Minor issues with the booking system but nothing major."
"Mixed experience. The scan itself was great and facility was nice. But communication leading up to it was confusing - got conflicting information about prep requirements."
"Absolutely phenomenal from start to finish. This is what preventive healthcare should look like. Every interaction was thoughtful and professional."
"Tried to book online but the system wouldn't accept my insurance information. Spent 40 minutes on the phone trying to sort it out. Very frustrating start."
"Good overall but results took longer than expected. Was told 7-10 days
"Had to reschedule twice due to work emergencies. First time was fine. Second time I got an email saying I'd be charged a fee even though it was more than 48 hours notice. Policy seems arbitrary."
"Incredibly impressed with the technology and expertise. The radiologist caught something my regular doctor had missed. Already scheduled my next annual scan."
"Horrible communication. Changed my appointment without telling me. Showed up and they said my new time was the next day. Complete waste of time and incredibly unprofessional."
"Very thorough scan and helpful staff. Appreciated the detailed report. Only wish the initial booking process was smoother - had some technical issues."
"Decent experience but nothing exceptional for the price. Scan was fine
"This is healthcare innovation at its finest. From the seamless booking to the comprehensive results review

"Tried to reach my Scan Advisor about a concerning finding for 3 days. Left two voicemails and sent two messages through the portal. Finally got a generic response that didn't address my specific question."
"Overall positive experience. Facility was state-of-the-art and staff was knowledgeable. Follow-up could have been a bit more personal but still good."
"System sent me a reminder for the wrong date and time. When I showed up they had no appointment for me. Took 30 minutes to straighten out. Their system clearly has issues."
"Exceeded expectations in every way. The preventive approach and thoroughness gives me real peace of mind. Already planning to make this an annual routine."
"Website crashed three times while I was trying to enter payment information. Finally had to call to complete booking. For a tech-forward company this is embarrassing."
"Great scan experience. Technician was excellent at explaining what they were looking at. Results were comprehensive. Booking process could be more intuitive."
"Scan was fine but the administrative side needs work. Multiple emails with conflicting information about what to bring
"Absolutely worth it. Caught an early stage issue that would have gone undetected for years otherwise. The team's expertise potentially saved my life."
"Requested to change locations. Request was ignored. Had to escalate to get it changed."
"Decent overall but felt a bit rushed during the results review. Would have liked more time to ask questions. Scan quality seems good though."
"Cancelled my appointment less than 24 hours before due to a family emergency. Was charged $200 cancellation fee with no flexibility or compassion. Will not return."
"Top-notch experience from beginning to end. The level of detail in the scan and results report is incredible. Feel like I finally have a complete picture of my health."
"Booking availability is extremely limited. Couldn't get an appointment for almost 3 months at my preferred location. For something marketed as preventive care that's too long."
"Good experience overall. Facility was clean and modern. Staff was professional. Results came back as promised. Would recommend with minor reservations."
"No one told me I needed to fast before the scan. Got there and they said I needed to reschedule. Communication about preparation requirements was completely inadequate."
"This is preventive medicine done right. Comprehensive
"Waited 4 weeks for results despite being told 10 days. When I called to check status I kept getting transferred and no one could give me a straight answer. Terrible communication."
"Really impressed with the thoroughness of the scan and the expertise of the radiologist. Minor administrative hiccups but nothing that affected the core experience."
"Scan was good but the check-in process at the facility was disorganized. Waited 20 minutes while they figured out their system. Not a great first impression."
"Excellent in every dimension. Staff was warm and knowledgeable
"Tried to upload documents through the portal before my appointment but the upload kept failing. Called support and they said it's a known issue. Why isn't it fixed?"
"Generally positive experience. Scan quality is clearly high-end. Follow-up could be more proactive - felt like I had to chase for information."
"Missed my appointment because the confirmation email had the wrong address. Drove to the location in the email and it was a completely different facility. Lost hours of my day."
"Cannot recommend highly enough. This is healthcare at the highest level. Every touchpoint demonstrated competence
"Online scheduling system doesn't show real availability. Selected multiple slots that all said 'available' but got errors when trying to book. Wasted 45 minutes before calling."
"Very professional experience. The scan technology is impressive and the staff clearly knows their stuff. Booking process could be streamlined but overall very good."
"Fine experience but didn't feel particularly special for the premium price. Scan was thorough and staff was competent but nothing exceptional."
"Impressed with how seriously they take every finding
"Customer service is non-existent. Tried to get clarification about my bill for a week. Multiple calls
"Good scan
"Scheduled for 2pm. Got a text at 1:45pm saying my appointment was moved to 4pm due to equipment issues. Would have appreciated more notice. Threw off my whole day."
"This is the gold standard for preventive health screening. The combination of technology
"Mixed bag. Scan itself was great. But between booking difficulties
"Really positive experience overall. A few small hiccups with scheduling but the core service - the scan and results review - was excellent."
"Got my results but they were missing key sections that were promised in the brochure. When I asked about it I was told that's 'only available in certain cases.' Felt like bait and switch."
"Outstanding service from start to finish. Every person I interacted with was knowledgeable
"Tried to reschedule my appointment 5 days in advance. Was told I'd have to pay a fee. Policy says 48 hours notice but apparently 5 days isn't enough? Makes no sense."
"Decent experience but room for improvement. Scan quality seems good but the whole process felt a bit impersonal. More of a factory than a healthcare experience."
"Results portal is confusing and difficult to navigate. Took me 20 minutes to find my actual report. For a company focused on user experience this is disappointing."
"Life-changing experience. The insights from the scan and the expertise of the medical team gave me a roadmap for optimizing my health. Cannot thank them enough."
"Facility was cold
"Solid experience. No major complaints but also nothing that really wowed me. Good scan quality and professional staff. Does what it promises."
"Impressed with how comprehensive the scan is and how knowledgeable the radiologist was. Feel much more confident about my health now."
"Extremely thorough and professional. The medical provider spent significant time explaining my results and answering questions. Felt genuinely cared for throughout."
"Scan was good but follow-up was lacking. Had questions about my results and it took multiple attempts to get connected with someone who could help."
"Very impressed with the medical side. Scan technology is clearly cutting-edge. Administrative processes could use some refinement but overall excellent."
"Website promised 'concierge service' but I've felt like just a number. Generic automated emails
"Flawless execution. From the initial consultation to the final results review
"Had a question about prep requirements and sent a message through the portal 5 days before my scan. Never got a response. Had to call day-of to confirm."
"Generally good experience. Few administrative issues but the core medical service was solid. Would use again despite the hiccups."
"Results contained obvious errors (wrong age
"Phenomenal service. The attention to detail and thoroughness is exactly what I was looking for. Finally feel like I have a true health partner."
"Okay experience. Nothing terrible but nothing exceptional either. Scan was fine
"Best healthcare investment I've ever made. The peace of mind knowing I have a comprehensive baseline is invaluable. The team went above and beyond."
"Tried to access my results online but the portal kept saying 'error loading document.' Called support and they couldn't fix it. Had to wait for them to email me a PDF days later."
"Impressed with the professionalism and thoroughness. Staff took time to explain everything. Only minor issue was some confusion about billing but they sorted it out."
"Scan was fine but the pre-scan communication was lacking. Wasn't clear what I needed to do to prepare. Had to call multiple times to get answers."
"Everything about this experience was top-tier. From booking to results delivery
"Scheduled my scan weeks in advance. Three days before

"Middle-of-the-road experience. Nothing went terribly wrong but nothing impressed me either. For the premium price
